generated_note: All features are difference (team_a - team_b) or symmetric availability indicators.

pedigree.availability_semantics: uses only World Cups with end_date strictly before kickoff
pedigree.leakage_rule: prior completed World Cups only; a team's in-progress WC is excluded
pedigree.missing_value_strategy: 0 (no prior WC = true zero) + z_pedigree_available indicator

squad.availability_semantics: age & position known at tournament start
squad.leakage_rule: tournament-start values only; no in-tournament stats

player_experience.leakage_rule: strictly prior World Cups; name+nation matched, no future data

squad_caps_and_national_goals.reason: Source coverage ~0% (caps/nationalGoals populated for <0.4% of players in every era).
squad_caps_and_national_goals.decision: excluded from modeling; would be fabricated, not measured.

weather.reason: Match weather is an observed/retrospective value with no pre-kickoff forecast provenance (see report §16).
weather.decision: descriptive only; never a model feature.
